daily.today_energy: Your grounded energy is getting a cosmic upgrade. Venus is whispering that it's time to shake things up—not in a chaotic way, but in a 'trust the plot twist' kind of way. Stay open.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether single or coupled, the vibe is about deepening connections through honesty. Real talk hits different today.
daily.career: Your natural ability to see the practical side of things is your superpower rn. Don't hesitate to speak up about ideas you've been sitting on. The universe has your back.
daily.health: Your body's asking for intentional rest, not lazy rest. Think: a walk that feels meditative, stretching that actually feels good, nourishment that satisfies. Listen to those quiet signals.

weekly.overview: this week has you feeling grounded but restless, taurus. venus is giving you that magnetic energy that makes people want to be around you. lean into it, but also check in with what you actually want versus what others expect.
weekly.love: someone's been on your mind and the cosmos is like 'go talk to them.' whether it's deepening something existing or starting fresh, your vibe is *chef's kiss* right now. just be honest about where you're at emotionally.
weekly.career: mercury's moving in your favor, making communication smoother than usual. if you've been sitting on an idea or waiting for the right moment to pitch something, this is it. trust your instincts but get the details right.
weekly.health: your body's asking for more movement and less screen time. even a daily walk hits different this week. sleep might feel off mid-week but it settles down by friday. listen to what you need, not what you think you should do.
